samples.xml_description:
<module id="multi_pipe_8bit">
    <description>Implement an unsigned 8bit multiplier based on pipelining processing.</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="clk">Clock signal used for synchronous operation.</input>
        <input id="rst_n">Active-low reset signal. Defined as 0 for chip reset and 1 for reset signal inactive.</input>
        <input id="mul_en_in">Input enable signal that controls the multiplication operation.</input>
        <input id="mul_a" width_description="[7:0]">Input signal representing the multiplicand with a data width of 8 bits.</input>
        <input id="mul_b" width_description="[7:0]">Input signal representing the multiplier with a data width of 8 bits.</input>
        <output id="mul_en_out">Output enable signal indicating if the multiplication operation is enabled.</output>
        <output id="mul_out" width_description="[15:0]">Product output signal with a data width of 16 bits.</output>
    </ports>
    <parameter_description>
        <parameter id="N">Set to 8 to represent an 8-bit multiplier.</parameter>
        <parameter id="N_1">Set to 7 to represent the number of bits minus one for an 8-bit multiplier.</parameter>
    </parameter_description>
    <logic_description>
        <sequential_logic id="mul_en_out_reg" type="sequential_logic">
            <description>Register to store the value of mul_en_in for use in the next clock cycle.</description>
            <input id="mul_en_in"/>
            <output id="mul_en_out_reg"/>
            <always>
                <condition>
                    <description>On the positive edge of the clock signal.</description>
                    <constant id="clk" value="1"/>
                </condition>
                <assignment>
                    <description>Assign the value of mul_en_in to mul_en_out_reg on the positive edge of clk.</description>
                    <left>mul_en_out_reg</left>
                    <right>mul_en_in</right>
                </assignment>
            </always>
            <output id="mul_en_out">
                <description>Output signal indicating if the multiplication operation is enabled.</description>
                <connect id="mul_en_out_reg"/>
                <bit id="0"/>
            </output>
        </sequential_logic>
        <sequential_logic id="mul_a_reg" type="sequential_logic">
            <description>Register to store the value of mul_a for use in the next clock cycle.</description>
            <input id="mul_a"/>
            <output id="mul_a_reg"/>
            <always>
                <condition>
                    <description>On the positive edge of the clock signal.</description>
                    <constant id="clk" value="1"/>
                </condition>
                <assignment>
                    <description>Assign the value of mul_a to mul_a_reg on the positive edge of clk.</description>
                    <left>mul_a_reg</left>
                    <right>mul_a</right>
                </assignment>
            </always>
        </sequential_logic>
        <sequential_logic id="mul_b_reg" type="sequential_logic">
            <description>Register to store the value of mul_b for use in the next clock cycle.</description>
            <input id="mul_b"/>
            <output id="mul_b_reg"/>
            <always>
                <condition>
                    <description>On the positive edge of the clock signal.</description>
                    <constant id="clk" value="1"/>
                </condition>
                <assignment>
                    <description>Assign the value of mul_b to mul_b_reg on the positive edge of clk.</description>
                    <left>mul_b_reg</left>
                    <right>mul_b</right>
                </assignment>
            </always>
        </sequential_logic>
        <combinational_logic id="temp" type="combinational_logic">
            <description>Set of wires to store the value of partial products before accumulating them.</description>
            <input id="mul_a_reg"/>
            <input id="mul_b_reg"/>
            <output id="temp"/>
            <assign>
                <description>Generate partial products using bitwise operations based on the value of the multiplier.</description>
                <left>temp[0]</left>
                <right>
                    <description>Partial product calculation based on the value of the multiplier bit at index 0.</description>
                    <conditional>
                        <condition>
                            <description>Multiplier bit at index 0 is 0.</description>
                            <constant id="mul_b_reg[0]" value="0"/>
                        </condition>
                        <true>
                            <description>Partial product is 0.</description>
                            <constant value="0"/>
                        </true>
                        <false>
                            <description>Partial product is the multiplicand shifted left by 0 bits.</description>
                            <shift>
                                <description>Shift the multiplicand left by 0 bits.</description>
                                <left>mul_a_reg</left>
                                <right>
                                    <description>Shift amount of 0.</description>
                                    <constant value="0"/>
                                </right>
                            </shift>
                        </false>
                    </conditional>
                </right>
            </assign>
            <assign>
                <description>Partial product calculation based on the value of the multiplier bit at index 1.</description>
                <left>temp[1]</left>
                <right>
                    <conditional>
                        <condition>
                            <description>Multiplier bit at index 1 is 0.</description>
                            <constant id="mul_b_reg[1]" value="0"/>
                        </condition>
                        <true>
                            <description>Partial product is 0.</description>
                            <constant value="0"/>
                        </true>
                        <false>
                            <description>Partial product is the multiplicand shifted left by 1 bit.</description>
                            <shift>
                                <description>Shift the multiplicand left by 1 bit.</description>
                                <left>mul_a_reg</left>
                                <right>
                                    <description>Shift amount of 1.</description>
                                    <constant value="1"/>
                                </right>
                            </shift>
                        </false>
                    </conditional>
                </right>
            </assign>
            <assign>
                <description>Partial product calculation based on the value of the multiplier bit at index 2.</description>
                <left>temp[2]</left>
                <right>
                    <conditional>
                        <condition>
                            <description>Multiplier bit at index 2 is 0.</description>
                            <constant id="mul_b_reg[2]" value="0"/>
                        </condition>
                        <true>
                            <description>Partial product is 0.</description>
                            <constant value="0"/>
                        </true>
                        <false>
                            <description>Partial product is the multiplicand shifted left by 2 bits.</description>
                            <shift>
                                <description>Shift the multiplicand left by 2 bits.</description>
                                <left>mul_a_reg</left>
                                <right>
                                    <description>Shift amount of 2.</description>
                                    <constant value="2"/>
                                </right>
                            </shift>
                        </false>
                    </conditional>
                </right>
            </assign>
            <assign>
                <description>Partial product calculation based on the value of the multiplier bit at index 3.</description>
                <left>temp[3]</left>
                <right>
                    <conditional>
                        <condition>
                            <description>Multiplier bit at index 3 is 0.</description>
                            <constant id="mul_b_reg[3]" value="0"/>
                        </condition>
                        <true>
                            <description>Partial product is 0.</description>
                            <constant value="0"/>
                        </true>
                        <false>
                            <description>Partial product is the multiplicand shifted left by 3 bits.</description>
                            <shift>
                                <description>Shift the multiplicand left by 3 bits.</description>
                                <left>mul_a_reg</left>
                                <right>
                                    <description>Shift amount of 3.</description>
                                    <constant value="3"/>
                                </right>
                            </shift>
                        </false>
                    </conditional>
                </right>
            </assign>
            <assign>
                <description>Partial product calculation based on the value of the multiplier bit at index 4.</description>
                <left>temp[4]</left>
                <right>
                    <conditional>
                        <condition>
                            <description>Multiplier bit at index 4 is 0.</description>
                            <constant id="mul_b_reg[4]" value="0"/>
                        </condition>
                        <true>
                            <description>Partial product is 0.</description>
                            <constant value="0"/>
                        </true>
                        <false>
                            <description>Partial product is the multiplicand shifted left by 4 bits.</description>
                            <shift>
                                <description>Shift the multiplicand left by 4 bits.</description>
                                <left>mul_a_reg</left>
                                <right>
                                    <description>Shift amount of 4.</description>
                                    <constant value="4"/>
                                </right>
                            </shift>
                        </false>
                    </conditional>
                </right>
            </assign>
            <assign>
                <description>Partial product calculation based on the value of the multiplier bit at index 5.</description>
                <left>temp[5]</left>
                <right>
                    <conditional>
                        <condition>
                            <description>Multiplier bit at index 5 is 0.</description>
                            <constant id="mul_b_reg[5]" value="0"/>
                        </condition>
                        <true>
                            <description>Partial product is 0.</description>
                            <constant value="0"/>
                        </true>
                        <false>
                            <description>Partial product
